message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor White
  ArrowColor Black
  BorderColor Black
  FontColor Black
}

class "Music_Recomendation" as Music_Recomendation {
  * id
  * title
  * description
  * created_at
  * updated_at
}

class "Music" as Music {
  * id
  * title
  * artist
  * album
  * duration
  * created_at
  * updated_at
}

class "API_Music_Recomendation" as API_Music_Recomendation {
  * id
  * title
  * description
  * created_at
  * updated_at
}

class "User" as User {
  * id
  * name
  * email
  * created_at
  * updated_at
}

Music_Recomendation --|> Music : "has"
Music_Recomendation --|> API_Music_Recomendation : "has"
Music_Recomendation --|> User : "has"

Music_Recomendation --> Music : "1"
